texto: The books were a private part of me that I carried inside and guarded and didn't talk to anybody about
autor: as long as I had the books I could convince myself I was different from the others and my life wasn't quite as stupid and pointless.
explicacao: Citação de as long as I had the books I could convince myself I was different from the others and my life wasn't quite as stupid and pointless. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The books were a private part of me that I carried inside and guarded and didn't talk to anybody …” articula reflexao, macdonald-harris, mortal-leap em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mortal-leap.
